title: One Piece
author: Oda Eiichiro
description: A young pirate's quest to find the ultimate treasure and become King of the Pirates.

title: Naruto
author: Kishimoto Masashi
description: A young ninja seeks recognition and dreams of becoming the Hokage.

title: Attack on Titan
author: Isayama Hajime
description: Humanity fights for survival against giant humanoid Titans.

title: Death Note
author: Ohba Tsugumi
description: A student finds a supernatural notebook that kills anyone whose name is written in it.

title: Fullmetal Alchemist
author: Arakawa Hiromu
description: Two brothers use alchemy to try to restore their bodies after a failed ritual.

title: Jujutsu Kaisen
author: Akutami Gege
description: A boy swallows a cursed object and joins a secret school to fight evil spirits.

title: Demon Slayer
author: Gotouge Koyoharu
description: A boy becomes a demon slayer to avenge his family and cure his demon sister.

title: My Hero Academia
author: Horikoshi Kohei
description: In a world of superheroes, a boy born without powers strives to be the greatest hero.

title: Dragon Ball
author: Toriyama Akira
description: A boy with a monkey tail searches for magical orbs that grant any wish.

title: Bleach
author: Kubo Tite
description: A teenager gains Soul Reaper powers and defends humans from evil spirits.

title: Hunter x Hunter
author: Togashi Yoshihiro
description: A boy follows in his missing father's footsteps to become a professional Hunter.

title: Vinland Saga
author: Yukimura Makoto
description: A young Viking warrior seeks revenge for his father's death in medieval Europe.

title: Berserk
author: Miura Kentaro
description: A lone mercenary fights demons in a dark medieval fantasy world.

title: Vagabond
author: Inoue Takehiko
description: The fictionalized journey of Miyamoto Musashi, Japan's greatest swordsman.

title: Tokyo Ghoul
author: Ishida Sui
description: A student becomes half-ghoul and struggles with his new nature.

title: Slam Dunk
author: Inoue Takehiko
description: A delinquent joins his school's basketball team and discovers his passion for the sport.

title: Haikyuu!!
author: Furudate Haruichi
description: A short boy with a big dream fights to reach the top of high school volleyball.

title: Fruits Basket
author: Takaya Natsuki
description: An orphaned girl discovers a family cursed to transform into zodiac animals.

title: Sailor Moon
author: Takeuchi Naoko
description: A clumsy girl transforms into a sailor guardian to protect Earth from evil.

title: Cardcaptor Sakura
author: CLAMP
description: A girl accidentally releases magical cards and must capture them all.

title: Nana
author: Yazawa Ai
description: Two women named Nana become unlikely friends in Tokyo.

title: Paradise Kiss
author: Yazawa Ai
description: A studious girl falls into the world of fashion and a complicated romance.

title: Skip Beat!
author: Nakamura Yoshiki
description: A girl enters show business to take revenge on the boy who betrayed her.

title: Chainsaw Man
author: Fujimoto Tatsuki
description: A boy merges with a chainsaw devil and hunts other devils for a secret agency.

title: Spy x Family
author: Endo Tatsuya
description: A spy, an assassin, and a telepath pretend to be a family for their respective missions.

title: Black Clover
author: Tabata Yuki
description: A boy born without magic vows to become the Wizard King.

title: Ao Haru Ride
author: Sakisaka Io
description: A girl reunites with her first love in high school to find he has completely changed.

title: Grand Blue Dreaming
author: Inoue Kenji
description: A college student joins a diving club that turns out to be mostly about drinking and chaos.

title: Mushishi
author: Urushibara Yuki
description: A traveler studies mysterious beings that exist on the boundary between life and death.

title: We Never Learn
author: Tsutsui Taishi
description: A hardworking student tutors three genius girls in their weakest subjects.

title: Kimi ni Todoke
author: Shiina Karuho
description: A misunderstood girl tries to make friends and finds unexpected love.

title: Ouran High School Host Club
author: Hatori Bisco
description: A scholarship student accidentally breaks a vase and must join an eccentric host club to pay off the debt.

title: Honey and Clover
author: Umino Chica
description: Art college students navigate complicated relationships and find their paths in life.

title: Nodame Cantabile
author: Ninomiya Tomoko
description: A talented but eccentric piano student and an ambitious conductor fall for each other at a music conservatory.

title: Loveless
author: Kouga Yun
description: A boy investigates his brother's death and uncovers a world of spell-battles.

title: Yotsuba&!
author: Azuma Kiyohiko
description: A cheerful green-haired girl discovers the wonders of everyday life with her adoptive father.

title: Goodnight Punpun
author: Asano Inio
description: A coming-of-age story following a boy's troubled journey through childhood and adulthood.

title: Delicious in Dungeon
author: Ryoko Kui
description: A party of adventurers explores a dungeon while cooking and eating the monsters they defeat.

title: Blue Period
author: Yamaguchi Tsubasa
description: A popular high schooler discovers a passion for art and pursues entry into Tokyo University of the Arts.

title: Frieren: Beyond Journey's End
author: Yamada Kanehito
description: An elven mage reflects on her past companions as she continues traveling after their quest has ended.
